changeList: 2.1.225-1-47044b2: PR #134 - Facebook ripper: retry via mbasic host when main host returns HTTP 400 (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/134) — ### Motivation - Facebook profile/reels pages sometimes return HTTP 400 when requested from the standard web host, causing rip failures as shown by repeated `Status=400` errors in logs.
